prompt: A multi-image sequence of 10 panels featuring the exact same person Yann LeCun, maintaining strict facial consistency and identity across all panels. Image 1: Yann LeCun depicted as a classical Greek marble sculpture. Image 2: Yann LeCun portrayed in a delicate watercolor painting style. Image 3: Yann LeCun wearing a formal police officer uniform. Image 4: Yann LeCun rendered in a vibrant pointillism painting style. Image 5: Yann LeCun standing gracefully in a snowy winter environment. Image 6: Yann LeCun positioned elegantly on a polished wooden floor. Image 7: Yann LeCun wearing stylish pink glasses. Image 8: Yann LeCun walking a dog outdoors on a leash. Image 9: Yann LeCun wearing a traditional academic doctoral cap. Image 10: Yann LeCun sitting and coding in front of a computer desk.
prompt_cn: 一组包含10张画面的组图，全部描绘完全相同的同一个人物Yann LeCun，确保所有画面中他的面部特征和身份严格保持一致。第一张图：古典希腊大理石雕塑风格的Yann LeCun。第二张图：精致水彩画风格的Yann LeCun。第三张图：身穿正式警服的Yann LeCun。第四张图：色彩鲜明的点彩画风格的Yann LeCun。第五张图：在冬日雪景中优雅伫立的Yann LeCun。第六张图：优雅地站在抛光木地板上的Yann LeCun。第七张图：佩戴时尚粉色眼镜的Yann LeCun。第八张图：在户外牵着狗散步的Yann LeCun。第九张图：头戴传统学术博士帽的Yann LeCun。第十张图：坐在电脑桌前专注编程的Yann LeCun。
global_prompt: A cohesive multi-panel sequence explicitly depicting the renowned AI researcher Yann LeCun, ensuring his distinct facial features, age, and identity remain perfectly consistent across every generated image despite changes in artistic style, clothing, and environment.
global_prompt_cn: 一组连贯的多画面组图，明确描绘著名人工智能研究员Yann LeCun，确保无论艺术风格、服装或环境如何变化，他独特的面部特征、年龄和身份在所有生成的图片中始终保持完全一致。
